inputs.label: Thrust (F)
inputs.businessContext: The thrust force produced by the engine.

businessContext_i18n.en: The thrust force produced by the engine.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Force de poussée produite par le moteur.

inputs.label: Mass Flow Rate (ṁ)
inputs.businessContext: The rate at which propellant mass is expelled.

businessContext_i18n.en: The rate at which propellant mass is expelled.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Rate, mit der Treibstoffmasse ausgestoßen wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux auquel la masse de propergol est éjectée.

inputs.label: Standard Gravity (g₀)
inputs.businessContext: Standard acceleration due to gravity (9.80665 m/s²).

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard acceleration due to gravity (9.80665 m/s²).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Accélération standard due à la gravité (9,80665 m/s²).

breakdown: Divide thrust by the product of mass flow rate and standard gravity.
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
